name: aer-skills
description: Agent skill stack for the American Economic Review, AER: Insights, and AEJ family. Covers topic selection, modern causal identification (DiD / IV / RDD / SCM / Bartik), referee-anticipating robustness, Keith-Head-style introductions, AER booktabs tables, AEA Data and Code Availability deposits, submission preflight, and R&R rebuttal letters. Includes Stata / R / Python templates, an optional StatsPAI agent-native implementation engine, and classic-AER-paper exemplars.
